commands: docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc 'mkdir -p /home/frappe/frappe-bench/logs && cd /home/frappe/frappe-bench/sites && ../env/bin/python -c "import frappe,json; frappe.init(site=\"frontend\"); frappe.connect(); accts=frappe.get_all(\"Email Account\",fields=[\"name\",\"email_id\",\"service\",\"smtp_server\",\"smtp_port\",\"use_ssl\",\"use_tls\",\"login_id\",\"password\",\"enable_outgoing\",\"default_outgoing\",\"enable_incoming\",\"default_incoming\",\"auth_method\"]); print(json.dumps(accts,default=str,indent=2))"'
